description: A screenshot of a social-media post from an account labeled 'Donald J. Trump' with the handle '@realDonaldTrump' and a profile picture showing a face overlaid with a U.S. flag pattern. The black-on-white capitalized text says the USA markets hit an all-time high, thanks tariffs, references the Supreme Court, and claims national and financial security have never been stronger.
notable_text: Donald J. Trump; @realDonaldTrump; The USA markets just hit another ALL TIME HIGH; THANK YOU YOU MISTER TARIFF
